# Daily Report — 2026-06-13

## Task Completed
Added `escalate_incident` tool to `incident_tools.py`. The tool PATCHes a ServiceNow
incident's priority field and optionally reassigns it to a different group, appending a
work note as an audit trail. Accepts an incident number (e.g. INC0010001) or a 32-char
sys_id; number inputs are resolved to sys_id via a preliminary GET. Human-readable
priority labels (Critical/High/Moderate/Low/Planning) appear in the success message.
Registered in `__init__.py`, `tool_utils.py`, and `tool_packages.yaml` (service_desk and
full packages).

## Test Results
- Total tests: 1605
- Coverage: 92%
- All passing: yes

## Security
System package vulnerabilities only (setuptools CVE-2024-6345, urllib3 PYSEC-2026-142/141,
wheel CVE-2026-24049) — none in project code.

- src/servicenow_mcp/utils/tool_utils.py — imported EscalateIncidentParams + escalate_incident_tool; added tool definition
- config/tool_packages.yaml — added escalate_incident to service_desk and full packages
- tests/test_escalate_incident.py — 10 new tests (number lookup, sys_id shortcut, all priority labels, 404/network errors, all optional fields)
